title: NodeRoutingConfig
description: R6 Pillar 5 / FR-27 per-playbook node routing contract. Lives inside sprk_playbooknode.sprk_configjson as additive properties on the existing node-config blob. Default-on backward compatibility: nodes without these fields default to destination=chat (current pre-R6 behavior). NFR-08 binding: the 11 production node executors are NOT modified — this contract is consumed by the FR-24 render-routing dedup site and StructuredOutputStreamWidget (tasks 040/041), not by the executors themselves. The DeliverOutputNodeExecutor's existing DeliveryNodeConfig record silently ignores these properties (additive-safe per System.Text.Json default UnmappedMemberHandling.Skip; confirmed at DeliverOutputNodeExecutor.cs:271-286).
$comment-additionalProperties: additionalProperties is TRUE because this schema describes only the routing-config subset of the larger sprk_configjson blob. The blob also carries deliveryType, template, outputFormat, outputType, targetPage, prePopulateFields, requiresConfirmation, and node-type-specific fields (sessionIdFrom, fileIdsFrom, etc.) read by other contracts. Validators MUST NOT reject blobs that contain those other properties.

destination.description: Per-playbook routing destination for this node's output. Optional — when absent, defaults to 'chat' (FR-27 backward compatibility). Q5 RE-SHAPED counterpart to action-level outputSchema (intrinsic shape on the action; routing on the node).
destination.$comment-values: chat: inline in conversation (default, pre-R6 behavior). workspace: streams to a workspace tab via StructuredOutputStreamWidget (REQUIRES widgetType). form-prefill: pre-fills a form via existing MatterPreFillService/ProjectPreFillService/useAiPrefill hook (NFR-07 — signatures UNCHANGED). side-effect: consumed for side-effect only (Dataverse mutation, indexing, notification) — no user-visible chat/workspace render.

widgetType.description: Workspace widget type — REQUIRED when destination=workspace; IGNORED for all other destinations. String to allow extension by downstream widget tasks (Summary, DocumentViewer, Table, Dashboard, …) without recompiling the contract. Matched against WorkspaceWidgetRegistry at render time (tasks 040/041); unknown widget types degrade gracefully via registry fallback.

allOf.$comment: Conditional-required rule: when destination=workspace, widgetType MUST be a non-empty string. Implemented as if/then per Draft 2020-12 idiom. This rule is also enforced in C# by NodeRoutingConfig.Validate() (see Models/Ai/NodeRoutingConfig.cs) — the C# validation is the authoritative check at runtime; this JSON Schema is for write-time tooling (Playbook Builder AI Assistant — Services/Ai/Builder/BuilderToolDefinitions.cs).

examples.$comment: Backward compatibility — no routing properties; defaults to chat
